Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Appearance At Deposition W/ Production Of Documents, To Extend Date For Completion Of Discovery & For Sanctions, Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Edward Kelly's motion to compel appearance and production of documents at deposition and to extend the discovery cut off is granted. No substantive opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 15 days of notice of this order. The period for discovery shall be extended to April 1, 2008 in order to conduct the deposition of plaintiff. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $290 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Text Ruling
